factions.name: The Eternal Circle
history: The party destroyed an Eternal Circle ritual site and recovered three stellar essence shards containing stolen star power. Cultists fled to warn Velkor at the main sanctum.
The party secretly helped the Eternal Circle recover a stolen relic.
The party publicly exposed the cult's activities and declared destroying their ritual site, forcing them to accelerate their plans.

questChains.title: Operation Fifth Starfall
questChains.description: The Eternal Circle has launched a coordinated assault to recover the stolen stellar essence shards.
